evals.prompt: /harness-engineering 帮我重构当前项目的架构
evals.expected_output: Detects Python stack, checks existing work (git log, handoff docs) before planning, generates init.sh using project's own test command, creates PLAN.json with only REMAINING features (not re-planning completed work), creates PROGRESS.md with decision rationale, updates .gitignore, responds in Chinese (matching user language), does NOT reference CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md harness mode
assertions: init.sh file is generated (or skipped if already exists)
init.sh uses project's own test command, not hardcoded runner
PLAN.json does NOT re-plan already-completed features
PLAN.json orders testing features AFTER the code they test
Every feature in PLAN.json has passes: false
PROGRESS.md includes existing work summary and decision rationale
Response is in Chinese (matches user language)
Response does NOT mention CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md harness mode

evals.prompt: set up this project for codex
evals.expected_output: Detects Node.js stack, generates init.sh using project's own test/dev commands (pnpm test, not npx jest), updates .gitignore, does NOT create PLAN.json (no task description), responds in English
assertions: init.sh contains Node-specific commands using project's own scripts (pnpm test / npm test)
init.sh does NOT hardcode 'npx jest' when package.json has a test script
Response is in English (matches user language)

evals.expected_output: Reads PLAN.json and shows ALL remaining features (not just next 3), reads PROGRESS.md for recent sessions, shows git log and checks alignment with plan, responds in Chinese, structured dashboard format
assertions: Lists ALL remaining features (not just next 3)
Shows recent session info from PROGRESS.md
Notes if git commits don't align with plan features
Response is in Chinese (matches user language)
